name: Cseresznyek Rumos Palacsintaban (Cherries in Rum Fritter)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Cherries, Bing, firm with stems
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the eggs, flour, 1/2 cup powdered sugar, and salt until smooth.
2. Let the batter rest for 1 hour.
3. Heat butter and oil in a frying pan over low heat. When hot, carefully dip cherries into the batter, then place them in the melted butter and oil mixture.
4. Turn the cherries by their stems to ensure they are evenly coated and become crisp golden brown on all sides.
5. Drain excess oil on paper towels.
6. Arrange fritters in pyramid shapes and sprinkle with powdered vanilla sugar.
